seoTitle: Urangan vs Urraween — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Urangan and Urraween. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Urangan and Urraween.
heading: Urangan vs Urraween — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Urangan, Queensland and Urraween, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Urangan and Urraween have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Urangan or Urraween safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Urangan has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Urraween scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Urangan scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Urraween scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Urangan or Urraween?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Urangan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
